summary: Fixed four issues flagged in prior reviews: (1) args no longer forwarded verbatim to runSingleFeature — empty array passed instead, preventing --dry-run flag leakage; (2) title sanitization regex extended to strip Unicode line separators U+0085, U+2028, U+2029; (3) stale in-progress recovery added as a pre-flight step — on startup, any board items left in 'in-progress' by a SIGKILL'd previous run are reverted to 'ready' before dispatching; (4) test quality hardened — console mock restores moved to try/finally blocks, lock.release() spy added to all acquired-lock tests and asserted, plus three new stale-recovery tests and one Unicode sanitization test added. All 553 tests pass.
